subcodes.first_line: The Word of God, though it be confined to a single word, is not equaled by all the books of the worlds. Grieve thou not that We have made brief this Tablet [3.5s]... ...The word which the one true God uttereth in this day, though that word be the most familiar and commonplace of terms, is invested with supreme, with unique distinction.
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلام الله ولو انحصر بکلمه لاتعادلها کتب العالمین انک لاتحزن بما اختصرنا اللوح
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
